query: Triple Bypass gran fondo cycling Evergreen to Avon

videos.title: A 7-Sports Xtra preview of the Triple Bypass, one of Colorado's premier cycling events
videos.description:
A 7-Sports Xtra preview of the Triple Bypass, one of Colorado's premier cycling events
◂

The Denver Channel, 7News, brings you the latest trusted news and information for Denver, Colorado, Mile High and the Rocky Mountains.

Our mission is to provide useful, interesting news and updates on breaking news to people in the Denver metro area, all across our beautiful state of Colorado and all over the world.

For more download the 7News mobile app:

iPhone:  http://bit.ly/iOS-kmgh
Android:  http://bit.ly/kmgh-android

she's on all 27 so far and she can
remember how it all started some 28
years ago anybody want to go for a ride
about 20 people showed up did a ride we
had a blast uh let's form a club that's
how team Evergreen got formed and a year
later someone said well let's how about
this for a ride and they laid it out on
paper everybody looked at it said that
looks really hard really stupid but
let's go do it and they did this ride
has it all 10,000 ft of climbing some

you want the double triple go to Triple

Avon back to Evergreen ride is still
open the double is open as well and Sue
summed it up for me it's a premier

and from other countries uh on our

videos.title: Triple Bypass Riders Enjoy Alternative Activities
videos.description: The ride was cancelled due to wildfires along the route.
videos.transcript:
a peak to fire and fire danger prompted
the cancellation of the triple bypass
bicycle ride today usually it takes
riders over three mountain passes and is
considered one of the top cycling events
in the country instead today cyclists
hit the roads around Evergreen but all
the riders seem to understand the
decision a fabulous job in terms of
accommodating the riders they had rides
today they've got this great Expo yeah
everything everyone would have liked to
have done the ride but you know you
compare riding the bike to people
fighting fires it's not it's a
no-brainer
well that Expo and the rides continue
and continue until 8:00 this evening at
Buchanan park in evergreen Denver

videos.title: Triple Bypass | Course Preview: Buchanan Park - Juniper Pass (version 5)
videos.description:
This preview depicts the first climb of Triple Bypass (visit https://triplebypass.org to learn more), an epic bike ride through Colorado's Rocky Mountains.

Starting in Evergreen and finishing in Avon, riders will cover 120 miles and ascend 11,000 feet as they cross three mountain passes Juniper Pass, Loveland Pass, and Vail Pass.

Set to "Tour de France" from the Chasing Legends Original Motion Picture Soundtrack, used with generous permission from Haik Naltchayan. Visit https://www.imdb.com/name/nm2298416/ to learn more, or follow these links to listen to the track:

- https://music.apple.com/us/album/le-tour-de-france/394260620?i=394260683
- https://open.spotify.com/track/1n9Q6xeDQli7wVL48oyK96?si=2e7c182f586749f4

videos.title: Triple Bypass Ride 2016
videos.description: Evergreen to Avon Colorado.  120 miles 10,600 feet of climb

videos.title: 2019 Triple Bypass Colorado - Team Carr
videos.description: 120 miles over 3 mountain passes in Colorado from Evergreen to Avon. 10,900 feet of climbing over Juniper Pass, Loveland Pass and Vail Pass. July 13, 2019. With Mark Schellenberg, Mike Heiy, Ross Elford and Bob Heitzman.
